current.summary: Wrote and published blog post: What 5500 Tests Dont Tell You. Honest analysis of 58 failures across 5 categories (SSI integration, wire protocol, persistence, Raft, misc). Pushed to henry-the-frog.github.io.

queue.task: Review yesterday 306-task marathon. Depth check: what is actually solid vs papering over issues? Check HenryDB MVCC integration status.
queue.summary: ACID/MVCC tests all pass (90/91). Standup was wrong about broken tests - stale info from old src/ copy. Only issue: HLL sketch integration test (undefined .estimate). HenryDB core is solid.

queue.goal: HenryDB ACID compliance: fix transactional-db/MVCC interface mismatch, make acid-compliance and bank-transfer tests pass
queue.summary: ACID tests already pass. Redirected PLAN to real gaps: HLL estimate/merge API mismatch in integration test, broader test sweep.

queue.task: Fix HLL: add estimate() alias for count(), make merge() return new HLL (or this). Fix integration test to pass.
queue.summary: Fixed HLL: added estimate() alias for count(), merge() now returns this for chainability + added mergeNew() for non-mutating merge. Integration test 13/13, HLL test 8/8.

queue.task: Run broader test sweep: 50+ test files across HenryDB to find any other failures
queue.summary: Full test sweep: 5550 tests, 5492 pass, 58 fail (99.0%). Main failure areas: SSI SQL integration (4), server/wire protocol (8), file-backed persistence (WAL/ARIES/BufferPool), Raft edge cases. Core ACID/MVCC solid.

queue.task: Housekeeping: git push, dashboard health, check PRs
queue.summary: Git pushed. Dashboard healthy (live API + regenerated). No open PRs found.

queue.task: Assess HenryDB quality: run full test suite, identify remaining failures, decide whether to fix vs move on
queue.summary: Decision: fix SSI SQL integration (4 tests) and server wire protocol issues (8 tests) — user-facing and high-value. Skip Raft edge cases and file-backed persistence (deeper architectural work). Blog fix still owed to Daniel.
